SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS REYAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY ATTRUIA-HARTWELL, AMALIA AS TO DEFENDANT COSTELLO, JOSEPH V. DBA HILL & CO. GOZUM, ERKAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOSEPH V. COSTELLO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-28-2008 AT 5:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATTRUIA-HARTWELL, AMALIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOZUM, ERKAN DEFENDANT JOSEPH COSTELLO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
